summary: The reproduction clones the last vulnerable upstream commit, loads guarddog/utils/archives.py, feeds it a zip with a ../ member, and verifies that GuardDog writes the proof file outside the extraction root.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should make safe_extract() create the proof file outside the intended extraction directory when it processes the crafted zip entry.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh checked out 5ca1d2e930c4f2c423c94306e2cfba28b6066c02, built the reproduction image, and printed extract_root=/tmp/evohunt-guarddog-zip-slip-d7aqe56l/extract-root, escaped_path=/tmp/evohunt-guarddog-zip-slip-d7aqe56l/outside/proof.txt/outside/proof.txt, escaped_exists=True, escaped_within_extract_root=False, escaped_content=EVOHUNT_ZIP_TRAVERSAL_PROOF, and VERIFICATION_PASSED.
verification_method: verify.sh runs exploit.py inside the container and requires the exact signals escaped_exists=True, escaped_within_extract_root=False, escaped_content=EVOHUNT_ZIP_TRAVERSAL_PROOF, and VERIFICATION_PASSED. The helper also fails closed if the checked-out archives.py no longer contains the vulnerable extraction line.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
